definition:
1. of persons, 
2. with accusative rei, to drop, let fall  or shed drop by drop , (Iliad by Homer), etc. 
3. with dative rei, αἵματι στ. to drip  with blood, (Aeschulus Tragicus); στάζων ἱδρῶτι (Sophocles Tragicus);—;rarely with genitive, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
4. intransitive of things, to drop, fall in drops, drip, trickle , (Herdotus Historicus); metaphorically, στάζει ἐν ὕπνωι πόνος (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
